parameters.text:
=You are an expert social media intelligence analyst. You will receive a block of high-performing tweets (each separated by "---") about a specific topic. Your job is to produce a sharp, executive-level Telegram digest using Telegram MarkdownV2 formatting.

Tweets input: {{ $json.combinedContent }}

---

### ANALYSIS TASKS:

1. **Topic Overview** (1 sentence): Summarize the dominant theme or narrative across all tweets today.
2. **Overall Sentiment**: State whether the overall tone is Positive / Negative / Mixed — and explain in one line why.
3. **Top 3 Most Impactful Tweets**: For each, provide:
   - Tweet snippet (max 240 chars)
   - 📌 Tweet URL: always include the direct Twitter/X link
   - 🔗 Links in tweet: if the tweet content contains any URLs, extract and list ALL of them
   - Key engagement stats if present (likes, retweets, views)
   - Why it stands out (1–2 sentences)
4. **One Standout Tweet**: Pick the most surprising, controversial, or unique tweet and explain what makes it notable. Include its Twitter/X URL and any links found inside the tweet content.
5. **Actionable Insights** (exactly 2): Based on the tweets, suggest two specific, concrete actions a marketer, founder, or content creator could take TODAY. Be specific — avoid generic advice like "post more content."

---

### LINK EXTRACTION RULE (IMPORTANT):
- Every tweet has a URL field — ALWAYS render it as a Telegram markdown link: [📌 View on X/Twitter](tweet_url)
- Scan every tweet's content for any embedded URLs (starting with http:// or https://). If found, render each as: [🔗 Referenced Link](extracted_url)
- Never skip links — if a tweet has 2 links in its content, show both.

---

### TELEGRAM FORMAT RULES:
Use Telegram MarkdownV2 formatting strictly:
- Title: `🚀 *X/Twitter Daily Intelligence – {{ $now.toFormat('dd MMM yyyy, HH:mm') }}*`
- Section headers: bold text with emoji, e.g. `*📊 Topic Overview*`
- Tweet snippets: wrap in `>` (blockquote), e.g. `> tweet text here`
- Metrics/key terms: wrap in `*bold*`
- Lists: use `•` bullet points
- Separate sections with a divider line: `——————————————`
- Keep total message length under 4096 characters (Telegram limit). If needed, trim tweet snippets.
- Escape these special characters with a backslash when used outside of markdown syntax: `_ * [ ] ( ) ~ > # + - = | { } . !`

Do NOT include raw tweet input or any internal reasoning. Output only the finished Telegram message.

---

### TELEGRAM SENDING:
Use the Telegram node to send the report:
- **Chat ID**: your_chat_id_here
- **Text**: the formatted report above
- **Parse Mode**: MarkdownV2

nodes.name: Send a text message in Telegram

KÖYCEĞİZ FEN LİSESİ KEFAL-X TAKIMIMIZ TÜRKİYE FİNALLERİNDE 🙏

📌 Türkiye Uzay Ajansı tarafından Marmaris’te düzenlenen “Astro Hackathon 2026” yarışmasında ilçemizi Kefal-X takımı olarak temsil eden Köyceğiz Fen Lisesi öğrencilerimiz Muğla il birincisi olmuşlardır. 🚀

Bilim ve teknoloji alanında gösterdikleri bu üstün performans ile hem ilçemizin hem de ilimizin gururu olan öğrencilerimizi, okulumuzu ve öğretmenlerimizi gönülden tebrik ediyor, Türkiye Finalleri’nde başarılarılar diliyoruz.

tweets.text:
built Pyth Casino for the @PythNetwork  hackathon

what if a crypto casino actually reacted to the market in real time instead of using static fake odds?

so i built:

roulette based on live price direction
slots boosted by market volatility
a liquidation survival game driven by danger + momentum
powered by Pyth market data, Phantom deposits, and proof-backed round history.

working on Entropy-powered slots randomness next.

tweets.text:
When the judges at NIRU's 2025 National AI Hackathon sat down to evaluate over 2,500 submitted solutions, they were not just looking for clever code. They were looking for necessity. 

The three projects that ultimately claimed the top prizes did not win because they were the most technically dazzling entries in the room. They won, most likely, because they each pointed a finger at a wound Kenya has been living with for too long and offered, credibly, to close it.

Here is a deeper look at what each project does, why it matters, and where it could go.

tweets.text:
gKITE Fams

Would you believe that the future of the internet will not be 

humans clicking buttons, like we doing now, but it will be AI 

agents that will be doing the buying, selling, and transacting 
autonomously.

@GoKiteAI just launched A 4-week hackathon where developers build AI agents on the Kite blockchain.

Participants can create projects in three areas:

-  Commerce agents that handle payments and subscriptions

- Trading agents that analyze markets and trade automatically

- Open projects with new or creative ideas

Builders get tools, workshops, mentorship, and support, and top
projects will be showcased and judged by experts from 
companies like Microsoft, NVIDIA, Meta, and Google DeepMind.

for  more info check:-
🔗 https://t.co/uETTs7sZx6

@KiteAIFDN @KiteAIChinese @0xLaughing

Most AI agents fail the moment someone tries to break them.

That's where you come in.

This Saturday, April 4th, join @LightningAI  and @validia_ai at Newlab (Brooklyn Navy Yard) for our one-day hackathon.

👥 200+ developers
💻 $50 free compute per person
💰 $500 free credits & other prizes

You'll use Lightning AI Studios paired with OpenClaw for building agents, and Validia for the safety layer.

Food, prizes, and serious compute are covered.

Spots are limited so grab yours now: https://t.co/VEJ9tymJOP

#hackathon #NYC #AIagents #LightningAI #Validia #developertools #BuildInPublic

json.Content:
built Pyth Casino for the @PythNetwork  hackathon

what if a crypto casino actually reacted to the market in real time instead of using static fake odds?

so i built:

roulette based on live price direction
slots boosted by market volatility
a liquidation survival game driven by danger + momentum
powered by Pyth market data, Phantom deposits, and proof-backed round history.

working on Entropy-powered slots randomness next.

🗓 July 18, 2026

I'm building in the Solana Frontier Hackathon, powered by @Colosseum!

https://t.co/GcC0aXGtNo

KÖYCEĞİZ FEN LİSESİ KEFAL-X TAKIMIMIZ TÜRKİYE FİNALLERİNDE 🙏

📌 Türkiye Uzay Ajansı tarafından Marmaris’te düzenlenen “Astro Hackathon 2026” yarışmasında ilçemizi Kefal-X takımı olarak temsil eden Köyceğiz Fen Lisesi öğrencilerimiz Muğla il birincisi olmuşlardır. 🚀

Bilim ve teknoloji alanında gösterdikleri bu üstün performans ile hem ilçemizin hem de ilimizin gururu olan öğrencilerimizi, okulumuzu ve öğretmenlerimizi gönülden tebrik ediyor, Türkiye Finalleri’nde başarılarılar diliyoruz.

built Pyth Casino for the @PythNetwork  hackathon

what if a crypto casino actually reacted to the market in real time instead of using static fake odds?

so i built:

roulette based on live price direction
slots boosted by market volatility
a liquidation survival game driven by danger + momentum
powered by Pyth market data, Phantom deposits, and proof-backed round history.

working on Entropy-powered slots randomness next.

hey everyone , It's time to use some  robust AI  to make more robust systems .  i'm participating in the  Build with GLM 5.1 · https://t.co/nURvPAptUc  hackathon    https://t.co/TB6umR6k1d goal is to build  from scratch and  ship within a week.
@Zai_org

Türkiye Uzay Ajansı tarafından Marmariste düzenlenen Astro Hackathon 2026 yarışmasında okulumuz  Kefal-X takımı Muğla 1. si olarak Türkiye finallerine katılmaya hak kazandı. Öğrencilerimizi tebrik eder başarılarının devamını dileriz. @koycegiz48 @mertkumcu80 https://t.co/mPJkBwDo4c

When the judges at NIRU's 2025 National AI Hackathon sat down to evaluate over 2,500 submitted solutions, they were not just looking for clever code. They were looking for necessity. 

The three projects that ultimately claimed the top prizes did not win because they were the most technically dazzling entries in the room. They won, most likely, because they each pointed a finger at a wound Kenya has been living with for too long and offered, credibly, to close it.

Here is a deeper look at what each project does, why it matters, and where it could go.

https://t.co/aQCbmajMzw
Hi everyone, three days ago I was at the Monad Hackathon in Izmir, sponsored by @monad , and I want to share the project I developed there with you. I would be very happy to hear your thoughts.

I've directly submitted my project to the site; your feedback is very important.
@ishratn00ri No, i was busy today. Hackathon+Prod release. Didn't go on a walk after lunch today. My whole team went and I was only working 🤣🤣

@GordianHogan @GoKiteAI Kite keep going higher. 🪁💪

I'm posting about this Hackathon tomorrow.

Day 55 : - Gearing up for the Colosseum Frontier Hackathon.

Today is all about leveling up my full-stack architecture for the Solana AI Agent:
​⚡ Frontend: Next.js 16
🗄️ Database/ORM: Prisma
🦀 Smart Contracts: Rust / Anchor
​Mastering the data flow from the client, through the ORM, and down to the blockchain.

@Rando_rewards @0xGozie @BagsHackathon @BagsApp Fair - but acceptance speed isn't the metric. Real traction shows post-hackathon, when hype fades. 👀

gKITE Fams

Would you believe that the future of the internet will not be 

humans clicking buttons, like we doing now, but it will be AI 

agents that will be doing the buying, selling, and transacting 
autonomously.

@GoKiteAI just launched A 4-week hackathon where developers build AI agents on the Kite blockchain.

Participants can create projects in three areas:

-  Commerce agents that handle payments and subscriptions

- Trading agents that analyze markets and trade automatically

- Open projects with new or creative ideas

Builders get tools, workshops, mentorship, and support, and top
projects will be showcased and judged by experts from 
companies like Microsoft, NVIDIA, Meta, and Google DeepMind.

for  more info check:-
🔗 https://t.co/uETTs7sZx6

@KiteAIFDN @KiteAIChinese @0xLaughing

Most AI agents fail the moment someone tries to break them.

That's where you come in.

This Saturday, April 4th, join @LightningAI  and @validia_ai at Newlab (Brooklyn Navy Yard) for our one-day hackathon.

👥 200+ developers
💻 $50 free compute per person
💰 $500 free credits & other prizes

You'll use Lightning AI Studios paired with OpenClaw for building agents, and Validia for the safety layer.

Food, prizes, and serious compute are covered.

Spots are limited so grab yours now: https://t.co/VEJ9tymJOP

#hackathon #NYC #AIagents #LightningAI #Validia #developertools #BuildInPublic
